label: Picture In Picture
desc: Submit inventory to the picture-in-picture processor. Requires 'main' (background video) and 'pip' (overlay clip). Optionally stores output files back into inventory under the configured keys.

params.name: videoKey
params.label: Store video.mp4 as
params.helpText: Composed video with PiP overlay. Leave blank to skip.

params.name: previewKey
params.label: Store preview as
params.helpText: Silent animated preview (AVIF, or MP4 fallback). Leave blank to skip.

params.name: textKey
params.label: Store text.md as
params.helpText: Title and body text content. Leave blank to skip.
